home.title: The new digital home of Serbian tennis veterans
home.lead: Tournament calendar, live draws and results, rankings and player profiles — in one place, in Serbian and English.

sections.upcomingSub: Entries and draws for upcoming events.
sections.rankingsSub: Qualitative (I–V) and age categories, by discipline.

calendar.title: Tournament calendar
calendar.desc: Filter by series, system, discipline and city.

players.title: Player profiles
players.desc: Points, ranking movement, tournament history, head-to-head.

referee.title: Referee portal
referee.desc: Draws, schedule and result entry — optimized for on-court use.

common.notFoundDesc: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.
common.wipDesc: This part of the system is under construction and will be available soon.

calendar.title: Tournament calendar
calendar.subtitle: Current-season tournaments — series, system, host and entry deadlines.
calendar.count: {n, plural, =0 {no tournaments} one {# tournament} other {# tournaments}}

tournament.eventsSub: Categories and disciplines within the tournament.
tournament.noEvents: Events have not been defined yet.
tournament.soon: Draws, schedule and results will be available once the director opens the tournament (referee portal — Phase 3).

auth.title: Sign in
auth.intro: No password needed — enter your email address and we'll send you a sign-in link. Clicking the link signs you in.
auth.noPassword: First time? Same process — if your email is in the member database, your account is automatically linked to your player profile.
auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open the message and click the link.
auth.sentHint: The message may land in Promotions/Spam. The link expires after a while — if it does, request a new one.
auth.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.errorLimit: Too many attempts — please wait a bit and try again.
auth.errorSend: Sending failed. Please try again in a minute.
auth.errorLink: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.helpBody: If your email isn't in the member database or you're stuck, contact your club coordinator — they can also enter tournaments on your behalf.

account.title: My account
account.linkedSuccess: Your account is linked to your player profile.
account.pickBody: This email is linked to the following players in our records. Pick your profile.
account.noMatchTitle: Email not found in the member database
account.noMatchBody: Your account is active but not linked to any player. If you are a TVS member, ask your coordinator to update your email in the records.
account.errorTaken: That player is already linked to another account. If this is a mistake, contact your coordinator.
account.errorClaim: Linking failed. Please try again or contact your coordinator.

referee.title: Referee portal
referee.subtitle: Tournament management — draw, result entry, publishing. For tournament directors and coordinators.
referee.loginNeeded: To access the referee portal, sign in with an account linked to your player profile (tournament director) or with coordinator rights.
referee.noTournaments: Your account currently manages no tournaments. If you are a tournament director, make sure your account is linked to your player profile (My account) or contact the coordinator.
referee.entriesCount: {n, plural, =0 {no entries} one {# entry} other {# entries}}
referee.needEntries: A draw requires at least 3 entries in this event.

ok.kreiran: Working draw created. Review it, then publish.
ok.objavljen: The draw is published and visible on the public tournament page.
ok.rezultat: Result saved — the winner advanced to the next round.

err.not_enough_entries: Not enough entries for a draw (minimum 3).
err.draw_published: The draw is already published — revoking is done by the coordinator.
err.not_working_draw: The draw is not in working status.
err.match_resolved: This match is already resolved — corrections are done by the coordinator.
err.match_incomplete: The match does not have both participants yet.
err.sets_required: For a completed match enter the score by sets (e.g. 6:3 7:5).

players.title: Players
players.subtitle: Member directory — search by name and category.
players.searchPlaceholder: Search by first or last name…
players.count: {n, plural, =0 {no players} one {# player} other {# players}}
players.empty: No results for the selected filters.

profile.noRanking: Ranking has not been calculated for this player yet.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.subtitle: Quality categories (I–V) by discipline. Sum of N best results over the last 52 weeks.
rankings.empty: The ranking for this category and discipline has not been calculated yet. It will appear after the first tournaments are played or existing data is migrated.
